raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senator Shannon Grove's bill would reimburse parents for 50% of qualified expenses related to virtual learning through a tax credit up to $2,250 per student.",
    "Qualified expenses for virtual learning include tutoring services, special needs services, books and supplies, computer equipment, software, and internet services.",
    "The transition to virtual learning has been forced upon nearly every school due to the shutdown of K-12 schools by Governor Newsom.",
    "Many schools have indicated their interest in continuing to offer some level of distance-learning programs even as they work to reopen.",
    "Research has demonstrated that the shift to online learning risks widening educational inequalities, exacerbated by the financial costs involved."
  ]
}
```
